theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) mixed with Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury - Light Variant)
theme_and_archetype.vibe: Elegant, feminine, trustworthy, premium, fast, and highly conversion-focused.
theme_and_archetype.core_concept: The aesthetic relies on soft pastel tones (blush, nude, champagne) grounded by high-contrast charcoal for readability, giving a high-end editorial feel akin to top-tier cosmetics brands.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-arabic_display

rules.anti_default: Never use Inter or generic sans for headings. Headings must feel editorial and luxurious.
rules.letter_spacing: Use tight spacing for English display fonts, but natural/default spacing for Arabic to preserve legibility of connected scripts.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing. Use 2-3x more spacing than typical to let the products breathe. p-8, p-12, gap-8.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Use Mode A 'Tetris Grid' for the home page promotional sections (Asymmetrical, mixing large hero product shots with small feature cards).
spacing_and_layout.product_grid: Grid-cols-2 on mobile, grid-cols-3 or 4 on desktop. Gap-4 on mobile, Gap-8 on desktop.

rtl_specific.logical_properties: CRITICAL: Use Tailwind logical properties (ms-, me-, ps-, pe-, border-s) instead of physical ones (ml, mr, pl, pr).
rtl_specific.alignment: Text defaults to right-aligned. Use text-start to respect RTL direction natively.

glassmorphism.usage: Sticky header, Mobile bottom bar, Filter drawers.
glassmorphism.classes: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/40 shadow-sm backdrop-saturate-150

product_cards.classes: bg-white border border-borders-default rounded-2xl overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-1

components.hero_section: RTL-native. Split layout: Text/CTA on the right (start), overlapping a massive high-quality image of a model on the left (end). Use Framer Motion for floating cosmetic items over the image.
components.trust_badges: Use react-fast-marquee with slow speed. Soft beige background, dark text. Icons for 'German Quality', 'Secure Payment', 'Fast Delivery'.
components.shop_filters: Desktop: Left (or logical right in RTL) sidebar. Mobile: Shadcn Sheet (Drawer) sliding from the start (right).
components.product_gallery: Use Swiper for image carousels. Enable React Zoom Pan Pinch for detail views.
components.checkout_stepper: Clean vertical or horizontal stepper. Highly usable, minimal distractions. Arabic labels.
components.admin_dashboard: Use Shadcn Sidebar, Recharts for analytics. Flat surfaces, compact grid (Mode B Control Room layout). Status badges in data tables.
components.floating_whatsapp: Fixed bottom-start (left in RTL). Green, highly visible but elegant, soft shadow.

patterns.page_load: Soft fade-in and slight slide-up (y: 20) for main elements.
patterns.hover_states: Product cards lift slightly. Add-to-cart buttons smoothly transition bg color and reveal text/icon.
patterns.scrolling: Lenis for smooth scroll. Parallax on hero backgrounds.

motion_and_interaction.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion in all Framer Motion variants.

icons.style: Light/Thin weight where possible to maintain the elegant aesthetic.

hero_lifestyle.alt: Elegant Arab woman wearing a scarf, lifestyle portrait
hero_lifestyle.usage: Main hero banner background or split image

soft_silk_background.alt: Soft pink silk fabric with subtle folds
soft_silk_background.usage: Background for 'Why German DM' section or testimonials

cream_texture.usage: Ingredients or 'How to use' section background

testing_guidelines.attributes: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case format.

instructions_to_main_agent: Set <html dir="rtl" lang="ar"> in the root document.
Use Tailwind logical properties heavily (e.g., ps-4, ms-4) to ensure the layout flips perfectly without manual RTL overrides.
Implement Lenis for smooth scrolling on the customer-facing site (disable on admin dashboard).
Use Shadcn UI extensively for the Admin Dashboard and complex forms (Checkout), but strip Vercel-like styles and apply our soft border radii (rounded-2xl) and brand colors.
For the e-commerce frontend, build custom product cards and layout structures using pure Tailwind to achieve the elegant, asymmetrical bento grids.
Do NOT use generic placeholders (like via.placeholder.com). Use the provided Unsplash/Pexels URLs in the media section.
Add 'data-testid' to EVERY button, link, and form input.
